title: Joachim Nagel: The digital euro - anchoring Europe's strategic autonomy in a digital future
body:
Keynote speech by Dr Joachim Nagel, President of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the House of the Euro, Brussels, 22 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260428f.htm

title: Michael Theurer: The environment and the banking sector - a new set of challenges from climate change and loss of biodiversity
body:
Speech by Mr Michael Theurer, Member of the Executive Board of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the Research Conference "Climate- and nature-related risks in the economic and financial system", jointly organized by the Deutsche Bundesbank and Bank of France, Paris, 12 March 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260428b.htm

title: Joachim Nagel: Central bank independence - why it matters
body:
Speech by Dr Joachim Nagel, President of the Deutsche Bundesbank, honouring Otmar Issing on his 90th birthday, Frankfurt am Main, 23 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260428g.htm

title: Olli Rehn: Geopolitical turmoil and the eurozone
body:
Speech by Mr Olli Rehn, Governor of the Bank of Finland, at the Washington Economic Festival "Global macro sessions", organised by Reinventing Bretton Woods Committee, Washington DC, 16 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260422i.htm

title: Christine Lagarde: The energy shock - where we stand and what we need to know
body:
Keynote speech by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the annual reception of the Association of German Banks on the occasion of their 75th anniversary, Berlin, 20 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260422c.htm

title: Christine Lagarde: IMFC statement
body:
Statement by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, at the fifty-third meeting of the International Monetary and Financial Committee, IMF Spring Meetings, Washington DC, 17 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260421b.htm
